data.title: French Brand Launch & European Strategy Upgrade: OMODA&JAECOO Showcases Global Achievements and Ecosystem Blueprint at Auto China 2026
data.description: OMODA&JAECOO has achieved nearly 1 million in sales over the course of three years. The company is now expanding into Europe, starting with their entry into the French market alongside noted actor Jean Reno through a network of 100 dealers. Following this, OMODA&JAECOO plans to expand further into Germany. To support their European operations, the company is establishing Research and Development facilities and operational bases within the European Union. Additionally, OMODA&JAECOO has announced their participation in the Auto China event set to take place in 2026.

data.title: New MHI and Deloitte Report Finds AI is Biggest Disruptor of Supply Chains Over the Next Decade
data.description: Atlanta-based Deloitte, in collaboration with MHI, released a report indicating that AI is anticipated to be the primary disruptor of supply chains in the next ten years. The report highlights the significant impact that AI technology will have on supply chains across various industries.

data.title: Healthcare Faces Cyberattack Every 10 Hours – Driven by Known Flaws and High Ransom Payments, Securin Finds
data.description: A report by Securin reveals that the healthcare industry experiences a cyberattack approximately every 10 hours. These attacks are primarily fueled by identified vulnerabilities, ransomware threats, and the trend of demanding high ransom payments.

data.title: Audited annual report 2025 of AS Pro Kapital Grupp
data.description: The Group's annual report for 2025 has been approved by the Council of AS Pro Kapital Grupp. In 2025, their revenue totaled EUR 53.2 million, marking a significant increase of EUR 35.0 million (193%) from the previous year's EUR 18.2 million. This growth was primarily fueled by higher real estate sales, driven by completed apartment handovers in the Kalaranna District and the Uus Kindrali project in Tallinn, as well as residential unit handovers in the City Villas and the Vilnius development. Comparatively, the revenue in 2024 was lower due to delayed apartment handovers in the Kalaranna District and limited sales throughout the year. The Group's operating profit for 2025 reached EUR 14.7 million, a EUR 14.6 million increase from 2024. The net profit at the end of the financial year was EUR 12.0 million.

data.title: Stocks nears record high as Wall St. shifts focus from war.
data.description: A recent study found that the number of households in the United States facing food insecurity has risen to 17 million, an increase of 3 million compared to pre-pandemic levels. In addition, the study revealed that 1 in 8 Americans, including 12 million children, may experience hunger this year. The research also showed that food insecurity disproportionately affects minority communities, with Black and Hispanic households experiencing higher rates compared to white households. Experts warn that without significant intervention, the situation is likely to worsen, highlighting the urgent need for additional support and resources to combat hunger in the country.
